strategic_objective: Determine the consistency and class-specificity of strong feature dependencies and evaluate their influence on dataset redundancy and interpretability.
key_checks: Measure dependency strength separately within BENIGN and DDoS classes
Analyze whether dependency patterns shift or weaken across classes
Examine potential redundancy impact by simulating feature removal or combination
Assess if dependency clusters align with known feature semantics or measurement processes
success_criteria: Clear evidence on whether dependencies are class-invariant or class-specific
Identification of dependency-driven redundancy affecting feature importance
Insights on whether dependency-based feature reduction could preserve or degrade dataset integrity
